name: partsupp_stock_classifier
description: Classifier that predicts an availability bucket directly from available quantity.
comment: Included as a direct thresholding classifier where the target bucket is defined entirely by availqty, so the model should fit it very well.
target_expression: CASE WHEN ps_availqty < 2500 THEN 0 WHEN ps_availqty < 5000 THEN 1 WHEN ps_availqty < 7500 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END
